# Daniel Bron

> Daniel Bron is an American entrepreneur, operator, and investor based in Miami, FL. He has been building ventures since age 12, spanning marketing, fintech, AI, legal technology, and emerging technology.

## About

Daniel Bron is the founder of multiple companies including Superposition Capital (seed fund investing in AI for regulated industries), Fulcrum (AI operations advisory), Solidity Law (financial and technology law), Lavr International (security consulting), and Bron Law (coming soon).

He has worked with companies reaching $2.2B+ combined valuations, including advising DeLorean and Lamborghini. He has spoken at the Javits Center and LA Convention Center. He is a University of Miami honors graduate and Peter Thiel Fellow finalist.

## Ventures

- [Superposition Capital](https://superpositioncap.com): Seed fund investing in AI for regulated industries
- [Fulcrum](https://askfulcrum.com): AI operations advisory, audit to deployment
- [Solidity Law](https://solidity.law): Financial law, regulatory compliance, technology law
- [Lavr International](https://lavr-int.com): Security consulting and logistical support
- Bron Law: Full-service legal practice (coming soon)

## Featured Work

- [Neuromorphic Computing - Expert Commentary](https://builtin.com/artificial-intelligence/neuromorphic-computing): Featured in Built In
- [The 4th Industrial Revolution](https://www.amazon.com/4th-Industrial-Revolution-Innovations-Decentralized-ebook/dp/B0C7SLFDY7): Published book on Amazon
- [Chain Reaction Newsletter](https://linkedin.com/in/dbron): 886+ subscribers on LinkedIn

## Timeline

- 2025: Superposition Capital launched
- 2024: University of Miami honors graduate
- 2023: Fulcrum founded
- 2022: Published book. Solidity Law. Peter Thiel Fellow finalist.
- 2021: Celebrity law and advisory
- 2020: DeLorean, Lamborghini. $2.2B+ valuations.
- 2016: First celebrity client at 14
- 2014: First venture at 12
